hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then .venv/bin/black --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; .venv/bin/ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '^(data/raw|data/processed|checkpoints)/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit files in data/raw/, data/processed/, or checkpoints/ — these are gitignored output directories.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
